headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: Gemini is Google’s ambitious AI assistant, now pushing into desktop automation with Gemini Spark on macOS. Super is built for people who want durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers — and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page compares what Gemini is great at today, where it fits best, and why Super is the sharper alternative for repeated computer-use work.
